query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT contactName) as retailCustomerCount
FROM billing_items
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%' 
   OR description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
   OR description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%';
